steps: Loads API reference for Python, TypeScript, Java, Go, Ruby, C#, PHP, or cURL
Includes Agent SDK reference for Python and TypeScript
Covers tool use, streaming, batches, structured outputs, and common pitfalls
Activates automatically when code imports anthropic, @anthropic-ai/sdk, or claude_agent_sdk
notes:
Usage: /claude-api

Features:
- Loads API reference for Python, TypeScript, Java, Go, Ruby, C#, PHP, or cURL
- Includes Agent SDK reference for Python and TypeScript
- Covers tool use, streaming, batches, structured outputs, and common pitfalls
- Activates automatically when code imports anthropic, @anthropic-ai/sdk, or claude_agent_sdk
